definitions.text: Something that is fixed in place, especially a permanent appliance or other item of personal property that is considered part of a house and is sold with it; compare fitting, furnishing.
examples: The residence was sold with fixtures and fittings.

definitions.text: A regular patron of a place or institution; a person constantly present at a certain place.
To furnish with, as, or in a fixture.
examples: The device is available in both handheld and fixtured models.
